form.label: Claude Enterprise - Claude Code & MCP
form.description: Claude Code adoption and MCP/connector governance. Activity panels work from the Compliance API; analytics panels require the analytics_reports input.

search.query: `anthropic_claude_index` sourcetype="anthropic:compliance:activity" (ai.event_type="mcp_*" OR ai.event_type="integration_*" OR ai.event_type="extension_*") | timechart count by ai.event_type

`anthropic_claude_index` sourcetype="anthropic:analytics:user_activity" | rename raw.claude_code_metrics.sessions AS sessions, ai.actor.email AS email | where sessions > 0 | stats dc(email) AS cc_users
`anthropic_claude_index` sourcetype="anthropic:analytics:cost" raw.product=claude_code | rename ai.cost.amount_usd AS cost_usd | stats sum(cost_usd) AS spend_usd | eval spend_usd=round(spend_usd,2)

panel.title: Claude Code Tool Accept vs Reject

search.query: `anthropic_claude_index` sourcetype="anthropic:analytics:user_activity" | rename raw.claude_code_metrics.tool_accepted_count AS tool_accepted, raw.claude_code_metrics.tool_rejected_count AS tool_rejected, ai.actor.email AS email | stats sum(tool_accepted) AS accepted sum(tool_rejected) AS rejected by email | eval reject_rate=if((accepted+rejected)>0, round(100*rejected/(accepted+rejected),1), 0) | sort - rejected | head 20

`anthropic_claude_index` sourcetype="anthropic:analytics:user_activity" | rename raw.chat_metrics.connectors_used_count AS chat_connectors, raw.cowork_metrics.connectors_used_count AS cowork_connectors, ai.actor.email AS email | stats sum(chat_connectors) AS chat_connectors sum(cowork_connectors) AS cowork_connectors by email | eval total_connectors=chat_connectors+cowork_connectors | where total_connectors > 0 | sort - total_connectors | head 20
